name_zh: 微信小程序 Skyline→WebView 落地迁移
name_en: WeChat Mini Program Skyline→WebView groundline migration
problem_statement_zh: 把一个跑在 Skyline 渲染引擎上的微信小程序落到 WebView 渲染，同时保持前端页面视觉/行为一致（最小改动，而非重写）：机械翻转 app.json 的 renderer，保留所有仍能在 WebView 渲染的 Skyline 期 workaround，检测并标记没有 WebView 对应物的硬 Skyline 特性为 rewrite，逐页用系统 vince-mp 校验并只修真实差异，并产出一份给下游 agent 看的 MIGRATION-MAP 对照调试文档。确定性 Node 扫描器是可测试的核心，文档生成器是最终交付物。
problem_statement_en: Ground a WeChat Mini Program off the Skyline renderer onto WebView while keeping pages visually/behaviorally consistent (minimal diff, not a rewrite): mechanically flip app.json renderer, KEEP the Skyline-era workarounds that still render under WebView, DETECT+FLAG hard Skyline-only features as rewrite, verify each page with the system vince-mp CLI and fix only real deltas, and emit an agent-facing MIGRATION-MAP debug doc. A deterministic Node scanner is the testable core; the doc generator is the headline deliverable.

must_activate_on: migrate/ground a mini program OFF Skyline ONTO WebView keeping pages consistent
must_not_activate_on: perf-only optimization with no renderer change
adjacent_confusions: a runtime screenshot/tap that mentions Skyline but is debugging → mp-cli-sup
manual_activation_phrases: 把小程序从 skyline 迁移到 webview 保持页面一致
migrate this mini program off Skyline to WebView

preflight: locate app.json + confirm renderer==skyline (if webview → already-migrated, STOP)
confirm a clean git working tree (flip is revertible)
steps: verify per page with vince-mp before/after
fix only confirmed deltas, smallest first, re-verify each
verification: live before/after consistency on the migrated program
failure_paths: vince-mp snapshot timeout → blocker not silent skip

forbidden_tools: editing the program before MIGRATION-MAP is written
allowed_paths: the target program's git working tree
